items.title: Once close enough for an acquisition, Stripe and Airwallex are now going after each other

items.summary: For most of its life, Airwallex and Stripe have mostly operated in different geographies, selling to different buyers. That's changing.

items.title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.

items.summary: Nicholas Moore hacked into three U.S. government networks using stolen credentials, and then bragged about it and posted victims' personal data on Instagram under the handle @ihackedthegovernment.

items.title: The RAM shortage could last years
items.title_zh: 内存短缺可能会持续数年
items.summary: According to Nikkei Asia, even as suppliers ramp up DRAM production, manufacturers are only expected to meet 60 percent of demand by the end of 2027. SK Group chairman has even said that shortages could last until 2030. The world's largest memory makers - Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron - are all working to add […]

items.title: Judge rules Trump administration violated the First Amendment in fight against ICE-tracking

items.summary: Jorge L. Alonso, a federal district court judge for the Northern District of Illinois, said that the Trump Administration violated the First Amendment when it pressured Facebook and Apple to remove ICE-tracking groups and apps. Judge Alonso granted the plaintiffs, Kassandra Rosado, who runs the ICE Sightings - Chicagoland Facebook group, and Kreisau Group, the […]

items.title: Cheap stuff that doesn’t suck, take 3

items.summary: From fancy OLED TVs to robot vacuums with arms, we tend to cover a lot of cool stuff here at The Verge that, unfortunately, often costs as much as a month’s rent (or more). But with the ongoing tariff situation in the US and a global memory shortage pushing up the cost of, well, everything, we’re well aware that not […]

items.title: Dyson’s handheld fan is more powerful and louder than I expected

items.summary: Two years ago I attended a picturesque outdoor wedding in August where the hot and humid weather had guests occasionally ducking into their cars to enjoy a blast of AC. Dyson’s new $99.99 handheld fan would have provided some much-needed relief then, although I’m not sure I would have been comfortable powering it up during […]

items.summary: With a vacation comes a big choice: What game should I focus on during the trip? I thought about grinding out the harder levels of Super Meat Boy 3D, but I was looking for something more chill. I could have dabbled more with Slay the Spire II, but I already know that's a game I'll […]

items.title: OpenAI’s former Sora boss is leaving
items.title_zh: OpenAI的前Sora老板即将离职
items.summary: Last month, OpenAI gave up on its Sora video generation tool, and on Friday, the Sora team's leader, Bill Peebles, announced that he is leaving the company. OpenAI has been shifting its priorities as part of an effort to avoid "side quests," and Peebles' departure is just one of many recent changes as the company […]

items.title: Should you stare into Sam Altman’s orb before your next date?
items.title_zh: 在下次约会之前，你应该盯着山姆·奥尔特曼的球体看吗？
items.summary: Tinder users who prove they're a real person by visiting an identity-verifying orb will soon be able to get five free boosts in the app - and it's just the latest service to embrace the orb. World, which was co-founded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, initially tested Tinder verification using its facial scanning orbs through […]

items.title: Anthropic’s new cybersecurity model could get it back in the government’s good graces
items.title_zh: Anthropic的新网络安全模式可能会让它重新受到政府的青睐
items.summary: The Trump administration has spent nearly two months fighting with AI company Anthropic. It's dubbed the company a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" full of "Leftwing nut jobs" and a menace to national security. But some of the ice may reportedly be melting between the two, thanks to Anthropic's buzzy new cybersecurity-focused model: Claude Mythos Preview. […]

items.title: Betting on the news raises ethical questions for journalists
items.title_zh: 押注新闻会给记者带来道德问题
items.summary: Prediction market exchanges have created an environment where just about any piece of information is potentially monetizable: How well will BTS's new song perform this week? How hot will Los Angeles get? Will Donald Trump be impeached? Users can wager on all of that and, on some platforms, more gruesome and violent outcomes in the […]

items.summary: Construction at the White House is expected to continue until the next hearing, due in June.

items.summary: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.

items.title: Alta do petróleo explica a valorização do real

items.summary: No ano passado, a moeda americana perdeu 10% de valor ante uma cesta de divisas de países desenvolvidos. A perda em relação ao real foi da mesma ordem. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h33)

items.title: A longa polêmica ambiental de Belo Monte
items.title_zh: 贝洛蒙特长城（ Longa polêmica ambiental de Belo Monte ）
items.summary: A usina hidrelétrica de Belo Monte, no Pará, é um dos casos mais representativos da disputa, recorrente nas gestões petistas, entre desenvolvimentismo e ambientalismo. A pressão exercida para autorizar sua instalação foi um dos fatores que levou à saída de Marina Silva, então ministra do Meio Ambiente, do governo em 2008. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h15)

items.title: Dívidas das famílias espelham gastos de Lula
items.title_zh: 家庭债务反映了卢拉的开支
items.summary: Nas últimas semanas, dívidas das famílias tomaram as discussões econômicas e políticas no país. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h15)

items.title: Feira indígena reúne peças de artes ancestrais de mais de 50 etnias no Ibirapuera
items.title_zh: 土著博览会汇集了伊比拉普埃拉50多个民族的祖传艺术作品
items.summary: A terceira edição da Feira de Arte dos Povos Indígenas reúne cem expositores que carregam tradições ancestrais de mais 50 etnias do Brasil, no parque Ibirapuera, em São Paulo. As outras duas edições foram realizadas em Brasília e em Belém. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h03)

items.title: Lula intensifica agenda voltada às mulheres para evitar perda de apoio feminino
items.title_zh: 卢拉加强了以女性为重点的议程，以避免失去女性的支持
items.summary: O presidente Lula (PT) intensificou agendas voltadas às mulheres nos últimos meses, em um gesto voltado ao eleitorado feminino, entre o qual perdeu vantagem nas mais recentes pesquisas de intenção de voto. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Criador da Embrapa fez do Brasil potência agrícola, mas demorou décadas para ser reconhecido
items.title_zh: Embrapa的创始人使巴西成为农业强国，但它花了数十年时间才得到认可
items.summary: "Não são poucas as pessoas que me perguntam quem, afinal das contas, foi o verdadeiro criador da Embrapa." A dúvida, embora não chegasse a tirar o sono de ninguém, persistia ainda no ano de 2005, quando foi registrada em livro pelo primeiro presidente da instituição, José Irineu Cabral, mais de três décadas depois da fundação da Empresa Brasileira de Pesquisa Agropecuária, em 1973. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Datafolha: quase metade dos usuários de bets diz apostar para obter renda extra e pagar contas
items.title_zh: Datafolha ：近一半的投注用户表示，他们下注是为了获得额外收入和支付账单
items.summary: Quase metade (46%) dos brasileiros que fazem apostas em bets e cassinos online afirma adotar a prática para obter renda extra e ajudar a pagar as contas, aponta o Datafolha. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Na encrenca do Judiciário, Tiririca estava errado
items.title_zh: Na encrenca do Judiciário, Tiririca错了
items.summary: Noves fora as farofas, impropriedades e onipotências de alguns ministros do STF, talvez esta seja a hora de dar um freio de arrumação na magistratura. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Não se pode cravar, mas terceira via na eleição de 2026 parece existir
items.title_zh: 你无法确定，但2026年大选的第三种方式似乎存在
items.summary: Tentar ler numa pesquisa de abril o comportamento do eleitorado em outubro é pouco mais que um exercício de quiromancia, sobretudo quando a Genial/Quaest registrou que há 62% de indecisos. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Indígenas LGBT lutam por políticas públicas específicas e contra invisibilidade
items.title_zh: 女同性恋、男同性恋、双性恋和变性者（ LGBT ）原住民
items.summary: A questão de identidade de gênero e sexualidade ganha cada vez mais espaço no movimento indígena do Brasil. A luta do grupo LGBTQIAP+ é por políticas públicas específicas e contra a invisibilidade dentro deste recorte étnico. Neste domingo (17) é celebrado o Dia Nacional de Luta dos Povos Indígenas. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Pope Leo downplays feud with Trump, says 'not in my interest' to debate him
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥淡化与特朗普的不和，说“不符合我的利益”来辩论他
items.summary: Pope Leo sought to downplay his feud with US President Donald Trump on Saturday, saying reporting about comments he has made so far during his Africa tour "has not been accurate in all its aspects".

items.title: France blames Hezbollah for French peacekeeper's death in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 法国将法国维和人员在黎巴嫩的死亡归咎于真主党
items.summary: The attack follows an agreement between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday for a 10-day ceasefire to negotiate an end to six weeks of fighting between Israel and the Iran-backed group.

items.title: Trump, Iran cite progress in talks as uncertainty hangs over Hormuz
items.title_zh: 特朗普，伊朗援引谈判进展，因为霍尔木兹的不确定性笼罩着
items.summary: The war, now in its eighth week, has killed thousands, spread to Israeli attacks in Lebanon and sent oil prices surging because of the de facto closure of the strait, which before the war carried one-fifth of the world's oil shipments.

items.title: Ombudsman chief arrest raises accountability concerns
items.title_zh: 监察员首席逮捕引发问责制问题
items.summary: Indonesian Ombudsman chair Hery Susanto allegedly received Rp 1.5 billion (US$87,296) in exchange for launching a rigged audit of the Forestry Ministry to reduce the amount of nontax state revenue (PNBP) to be paid by a nickel company.

items.title: Iran closes Hormuz Strait again, as Trump warns against 'blackmail'
items.title_zh: 伊朗再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，特朗普警告不要“勒索”
items.summary: Iran's military declared the Strait of Hormuz closed again on Saturday, prompting ships to abandon attempts to transit the waterway and President Donald Trump to warn Tehran against trying to "blackmail" the United States.

items.title: China humanoid robot half-marathon to showcase technical leaps
items.title_zh: 中国人形机器人半程马拉松展示技术飞跃
items.summary: Almost 40 percent of the robot participants will navigate the course autonomously in a high-profile demonstration of the industry's growing capabilities, according to the race organizers.

items.title: Australia, Japan ink multibillion dollar warship deal
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚、日本签署价值数十亿美元的战舰协议
items.summary: Japan is deepening cooperation with United States allies in the Asia-Pacific region that, like Tokyo, are involved in territorial disputes with China.

items.title: Record number of Rohingya refugees died at sea last year: UNHCR
items.title_zh: 去年在海上死亡的罗兴亚难民人数创纪录：联合国难民署
items.summary: More than one in seven of the estimated 6,500 Rohingya refugees who attempted the sea crossing last year were reported missing or dead.

items.title: US renews Russian oil waiver after pressure from countries
items.title_zh: 在各国施压后，美国延长俄罗斯石油豁免
items.summary: The move is part of the administration's effort to control global energy prices that have shot higher during the US-Israeli war on Iran.

items.title: Riau teacher named suspect in death of student testing 3D-printed rifle
items.title_zh: Riau老师将学生测试3D打印步枪死亡的嫌疑人命名为嫌疑人
items.summary: Police named the female suspect for negligence but did not detain her because she was cooperative throughout the investigation.

items.title: 'Red flag': US intel flags Pakistan army chief Asim Munir as risk for Trump admin, says report
items.title_zh: 报告称， “红旗” ：美国情报部门将巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔标记为特朗普政府的风险
items.summary: US intelligence reportedly views Pakistan's army chief Asim Munir as a potential liability for the Trump administration due to his alleged ties to Iran's military. Despite Trump's praise, officials warn Munir's mediation role between Iran and the US amid Middle East tensions could compromise American interests, citing Pakistan's history as an unreliable ally.

items.title: 'Whether people like Israel or not ... ': Trump hails 'great ally' of US for 'knowing how to win'
items.title_zh: “无论人们是否喜欢以色列......” ：特朗普称赞我们的“伟大盟友” “知道如何获胜”

items.title: Caught on camera: Kavya Maran's wild celebration after SRH down CSK - Watch
items.title_zh: 在镜头前捕捉： Kavya Maran在SRH下CSK之后的狂欢庆祝活动-观看
items.summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a thrilling 10-run victory over Chennai Super Kings, propelling them into the top four of the IPL 2026 standings. Strong death bowling and crucial half-centuries from Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen were key to the win. Despite a strong chase from CSK, SRH's bowlers held their nerve to clinch the crucial points.

items.title: Ex-soldier among 2 killed in militant ambush on NH-202 in Manipur; 3 injured
items.title_zh: 2名前士兵在曼尼普尔邦NH-202的武装伏击中丧生； 3人受伤
items.summary: In a tragic turn of events, a militant ambush on NH-202 in Manipur's Ukhrul district has resulted in the deaths of two individuals, including a retired Army personnel. Three others sustained injuries in the attack that transpired on Saturday afternoon while a convoy made its way from Imphal to Ukhrul.

items.title: 'Horrible outcome' for US...': Nvidia CEO Huang's warning on 'working' with China
items.title_zh: “可怕的结果”对我们来说...... ： Nvidia首席执行官黄警告与中国“合作”
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang warns that the US risks losing AI dominance if it restricts chip sales to China, potentially ceding the market to rivals like Huawei. He argues that open-source models optimized for non-American hardware pose a significant threat, urging balanced regulations to allow US companies to compete globally and maintain technological leadership.

items.title: 'Committed foeticide': PM Modi slams opposition; apologises to women for bill’s defeat
items.title_zh: “承诺堕胎” ：莫迪总理猛烈抨击反对派；为比尔的失败向妇女道歉

items.title: ‘Relations very strong’: Iran after India summons envoy over firing on its vessels in Hormuz
items.title_zh: “关系非常牢固” ：印度传唤特使后，伊朗向其在霍尔木兹的船只开火
items.summary: Iran's top representative in India, Dr. Abdul Majid Hakeem Ilahi, addressed a shooting incident involving India-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, emphasizing strong bilateral ties. He stated he had no information about the event but expressed hope for its peaceful resolution, advocating for peace in the region.

items.title: Watch: Canada PM Mark Carney celebrates Sikh Heritage Month, joins community service
items.title_zh: 观看：加拿大总理马克·卡尼庆祝锡克教遗产月，加入社区服务
items.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney marked Sikh Heritage Month by participating in community service at Gurdwara Sahib Ottawa. He highlighted Canada's significant Sikh population, the world's second-largest, and their contributions to national prosperity.  Across Canada, events like the 'Baaghi ja Badshah' exhibition and diaspora celebrations in Toronto underscore Sikh history, values, and the strong India-Canada cultural connection.

items.title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
items.title_zh: 微软和苹果的编码工具将“很快死亡” ： Antrophic的人工智能编码工具的创造者
items.summary: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

items.title: 'Vaishali didn't even see chess for 15 days': A miraculous story behind Candidates glory
items.title_zh: “Vaishali在15天内甚至没有看到国际象棋” ：候选人荣耀背后的奇迹故事
items.summary: Vaishali Rameshbabu’s journey to the Women’s Candidates title wasn’t easy. After a poor run in Chennai shattered her confidence, she even considered skipping the Grand Swiss. A crucial two-hour call with Karthikeyan Murali changed her mind. A mental reset helped her win the event, regain form, and now she prepares to face world champion Ju Wenjun.

items.title: Parent Taking Child's Custody By Force Not Illegal Unless Law Violated: Allahabad High Court
items.title_zh: 除非违反法律，否则以武力夺取儿童监护权的父母并非非法：阿拉哈巴德高等法院
items.summary: The court also referred to section 4(2) of the Guardians and Wards Act

items.title: Murder Over Minor Accident Triggers Violence, Arson In Ahmedabad
items.title_zh: 轻微事故谋杀引发暴力，艾哈迈达巴德纵火
items.summary: Videos circulating on social media showed small shops engulfed in flames.

items.title: Journalist-Turned Politician, BJP Veteran Balbir Punj Dies
items.title_zh: 记者出身的政治家，印度人民党退伍军人Balbir Punj去世
items.summary: Punj built a distinguished career in journalism before joining politics.

items.title: Venezuela's Machado Says "No Regrets" Over Gifting Trump Nobel Peace Prize
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉的马查多对赠送特朗普诺贝尔和平奖表示“不后悔”
items.summary: Machado said she was organising her return to the country.

items.summary: PM Narendra Modi: PM Modi's last address to the nation was on September 21, 2025

items.title_zh: “被小心翼翼地调查” ：收藏家在Vedanta锅炉爆炸中杀死了23人
items.summary: 12 workers are still undergoing treatment in various hospitals.

items.title_zh: 2包括在曼尼普尔邦乌赫鲁尔的高速公路伏击中丧生的退役士兵
items.summary: Two men were killed and three vehicles were damaged in the ambush in Manipur's Ukhrul

items.summary: US-Iran War, Peace Talks Highlights: The war began on February 28

items.title_zh: 随着特朗普对巴基斯坦总统阿西姆·穆尼尔（ Asim Munir ）的关注，美国报告的“红旗”警告
items.summary: Munir finished a three-day visit to Iran aimed at securing the peace deal

items.title_zh: 枪手劫持人质，在基辅超市开火， 6人被杀

items.title: アメリカとイラン 2回目の協議 先行き見通せず
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗之间没有第二次会晤的可能性
items.summary: アメリカとイランの停戦期限が近づくなか、アメリカのトランプ大統領は、側近らを集めて会議を開いたものの、イランとの2回目の協議の日程は未定のままだと伝えられました。またイラン議会のガリバフ議長は「アメリカとの間で依然として大きな隔たりがある」と述べ、協議の先行きは見通せない状況となっています。

items.title: 渋谷 バス停に車突っ込む 運転の男性意識なし 歩行者1人搬送
items.title_zh: 昏迷的男人开车进入涩谷巴士站运送一名行人
items.summary: 19日午前、東京・渋谷区で車がバス停に突っ込む事故があり、消防によりますと、車の運転手が意識がなく、歩行者1人が病院に搬送されました。

items.title: 各地で気温上昇 関東や近畿で夏日のところも 体調管理に注意
items.title_zh: 关东和近畿地区不同地区的气温升高夏天也要注意身体状况管理
items.summary: 19日は北海道から近畿にかけての広い範囲で晴れて気温が上がっていて、午前中から25度以上の夏日になっているところがあります。午後はさらに気温が上がる見込みで、こまめに水分を補給するなど体調の管理に注意してください。

items.title: 仙台 住宅街にクマとどまる 市と警察は緊急銃猟含め対応検討
items.title_zh: 市政府和住在仙台住宅区的警察将考虑应对紧急枪支狩猎。
items.summary: 19日午前、仙台市の住宅街にクマ1頭がいるのが確認され、市と警察は「緊急銃猟」も含めて対応を検討しています。

items.title: IT関連会社 遺体遺棄事件 峠周辺で捜索続く 警視庁
items.title_zh: IT公司活动
items.summary: 去年から行方が分からなくなっている東京のIT関連会社の50代の男性役員とみられる遺体を遺棄したとして、会社の代表を務める49歳の容疑者が逮捕された事件で、警視庁は19日も遺体が遺棄された可能性がある東京と神奈川の県境にある峠の周辺を捜索しています。容疑者は男性が行方不明になったあと、レンタカーで付近を訪れていたとみられるということで、警視庁が詳しいいきさつを調べています。

items.title: 京都 男児遺体遺棄事件 “学校送るも別場所で殺害”趣旨供述
items.title_zh: “”是学生犯下的罪行“”
items.summary: 京都府南丹市の山林に小学生の遺体が遺棄された事件で、逮捕された37歳の父親が逮捕前の任意の調べに「車で息子を小学校まで送っていったが、そのまま市内の別の場所に連れていき、殺害した」という趣旨の供述をしていたことが捜査関係者への取材で分かりました。

items.title: 北朝鮮 日本海へ短距離弾道ミサイル数発発射 韓国軍発表
items.title_zh: 朝鲜向日本海发射多枚短程弹道导弹
items.summary: 韓国軍は、北朝鮮が19日朝に東部シンポ（新浦）付近から日本海に向けて短距離弾道ミサイルを数発発射したと発表しました。シンポには潜水艦の基地があるとされ、韓国メディアはSLBM＝潜水艦発射弾道ミサイルが発射された可能性があると伝えています。

items.title: Hajj Ministry asserts no entry to Makkah without an official Hajj permit
items.title_zh: 朝觐部声称，未经官方朝觐许可，不得进入麦加
items.summary: MAKKAH — The Ministry of Hajj and Umrah stressed the importance of all pilgrims’ affairs offices and Hajj service providers to inform pilgrims of the need to obtain an official permit to perform Hajj rituals for this year and to adhere to the approved procedures for entering Makkah and the holy sites. This is part of the ministry’s commitment to pilgrims’ safety, the quality of services provided, and enabling them to perform their rituals in a safe and organized environment.The ministry stressed that performing Hajj is restricted to those who have obtained an official permit from the competent authorities. “No leniency will be shown toward any attempt to perform Hajj without a permit, as this constitutes a clear violation of laws and regulations, and that legal penalties will be enforced against violators,” it said.The ministry emphasized that compliance with official procedures contributes to raising safety and organizational standards, enhancing the efficiency of crowd management, ensuring the smooth flow ofmovement within the holy sites, and improving the overall pilgrim experience during the season.The ministry stated that coordination with pilgrims’ affairs offices and service providers began immediately after last year’s Hajj season concluded, through periodic meetings and ongoing awareness programs. This aims to strengthen awareness of laws and instructions, stress adherence to approved requirements, enhance compliance levels, achieve the highest standards of safety and organization, and improve the quality of services provided to pilgrims.

items.title: 14,487 violators of residency, border security and labor laws arrested in a week
items.title_zh: 在一周内逮捕了14,487名违反居住、边境安全和劳动法的人
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi security authorities arrested a total of 14,487 illegal residents during the last week. The arrests were made in the joint inspections, carried out by the security forces in collaboration with the relevant government agencies, during the period between April 9 and April 15, the Ministry of Interior revealed on Saturday. Those who were arrested include 7,911 of the Residency Law, 3,588 violators of the Border Security Law, and 2,988 violators of the Labor Law. A total of 21,127 violators were referred to their diplomatic missions to obtain travel documents while 11,240 violators were referred to complete their travel reservations and 12,554 violators were deported. The total number of people who were arrested while trying to cross the border into the Kingdom accounted for 1,382, of whom 38 percent were Yemeni nationals, 61percent Ethiopian nationals, and one percent belonged to other nationalities. A total of 43 people were arrested while attempting to leave the Kingdom illegally. Some 23 people involved in giving transportation, shelter, and employment for violators were also arrested. A total of 39,258 expatriates, including 35,460 men and 3,798 women, are currently undergoing procedures to enforce legal measures against them. The Ministry of Interior has warned that any person, who facilitates the illegal entry of individuals into the Kingdom, transports them on its territory, provides them with shelter or any other assistance or service, will be penalized with up to 15 years in prison and a fine of up to SR1 million, and that the vehicles used for transportation or houses used for giving shelter will be confiscated. The ministry urged the public to report any cases of violation by calling the number 911 in the regions of Makkah, Riyadh, and the Eastern Province and the numbers 999 and 996 in the rest of the Kingdom’s regions.

items.title: Dust storm hits Jeddah and other governorates of Makkah
items.title_zh: 沙尘暴袭击吉达和麦加其他省份
items.summary: MAKKAH — Jeddah and several other governorates of the Makkah region witnessed a dust storm on Saturday. This follows the forecast of the National Center for Meteorology (NCM), which stated earlier that active winds stirring up dust would hit the governorates of Jeddah, Rabigh, Bahra, Al-Kamil, Khulais, and Allith, including open areas and highways, leading to reduced horizontal visibility. The center indicated that the conditions persisted until 7:00 in the evening. Earlier on the day, NCM predicted thunderstorms accompanied by active winds and dust in Makkah. The report stated that the maximum temperature would reach 39 degrees Celsius, while the minimum would drop to 29 degrees Celsius, with a humidity level of approximately 40 percent. The center also warned of strong winds in the Hail region, including open areas and highways, leading to reduced horizontal visibility, with wind speeds reaching 40-49 km/h.

items.title: Holy Kaaba maintenance completed with highest global standards
items.title_zh: 以最高的全球标准完成Holy Kaaba维护
items.summary: MAKKAH — The General Authority for the Care of the Grand Mosque and the Prophet’s Mosque announced the completion of routine maintenance of the Holy Kaaba and Hijr Ismail, in line with the highest engineering and technical standards. It said the project was carried out under a precise operational plan that ensured smooth pilgrim flow without affecting rituals. The works took about 4,700 man-hours and included 31 main packages and 305 activities, covering maintenance of the Kaaba’s interior, roof, and surroundings, as well as detailed inspections and tests. The scope of work also included the replacement of more than 30 linear meters of expansion joints (silicone) around the Kaaba, the re-grouting of more than 50 meters of marble joints, as well as polishing and finishing the surrounding marble floors from all directions.The project was implemented by qualified Saudi personnel using advanced technologies and materials compliant with international standards, enhancing operational efficiency and ensuring the long-term sustainability of the Kaaba’s components.

items.title: First batches of pilgrims land in Madinah and Jeddah as international arrivals commence for Hajj 2026
items.title_zh: 随着2026年朝觐的国际抵达开始，第一批朝圣者抵达麦地那和吉达
items.summary: MADINAH — The first batches of Hajj pilgrims from several countries arrived in Madinah and Jeddah on Saturday, Dhul Qada 1, marking the commencement of international arrivals for this year’s pilgrimage. They included pilgrims traveling under the Makkah Route initiative from Turkiye, Pakistan, Malaysia, and Bangladesh in addition to the pilgrims from India. Most of the pilgrims arrived at Prince Mohammed bin Abdulaziz International Airport in Madinah on Saturday while some groups of pilgrims landed at King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah. Saudi officials as well as diplomats from the respective countries accorded a warm reception for the pilgrims. The General Directorate of Passports at Madinah airport processed the Turkish Hajj pilgrims arrived from Ankara Esenboğa Airport for the annual pilgrimage under the Makkah Route Initiative. Saudi officials and Pakistani diplomats received first flight from Pakistan. The flight carrying pilgrims from Jinnah International Airport in Karachi, arrived at Madinah airport. Saudi Arabia inaugurated on Saturday the third embarkation point of the Makkah Route initiative in Pakistan by launching the service from Allama Iqbal International Airport in Lahore. Pakistani Minister of Religious Affairs Sardar Muhammad Yousaf, Saudi Ambassador to Pakistan Nawaf Al-Maliki, and Saudi Director General of Passports Maj. Gen. Saleh Al-Murabba attended the launching ceremony. The flight, under the Makkah Route Initiative, carrying Malaysian pilgrims from Kuala Lumpur International Airport, landed at Madinah airport. The first flight carrying beneficiaries of the Makkah Route Initiative departed on Saturday from Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport, Dhaka, bound for King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah. Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman and Saudi Ambassador to Bangladesh Dr. Abdullah bin Abiyah were present to see off the pilgrims at the airport. The first batch of Indian pilgrims arrived in Saudi Arabia for the annual Haj pilgrimage, the Indian mission in Saudi Arabia said. “The first group of Indian pilgrims was received at Madinah airport by Deputy Ministers of Hajj and Umrah Prof. Abdulaziz Wazzan and Eng. Ayad Abdulrahman Rahbini, Indian Ambassador Dr. Suhel Ajaz Khan and Consul General Fahad Ahmed Khan Suri. The first flight carrying 400 pilgrims came from Mumbai, and it was followed by 10 flights from other Indian cities. The first flight carrying Indian private pilgrims landed at Jeddah airport. The General Directorate of Passports affirmed its comprehensive readiness to facilitate a seamless entry experience for pilgrims across all air, land, and sea ports by mobilizing advanced technological resources and specialized personnel to ensure the highest service standards throughout the Hajj season. The Ministry of Interior has been implementing the Makkah Route initiative for the eighth year in 2026. This year the number of beneficiary countries of this initiative rose to 10 with the addition of Senegal and Brunei Darussalam for the first time. Other countries are Morocco, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Turkey, Ivory Coast, and the Maldives. Since its launch in 2017, the initiative has so far served 1,254,994 pilgrims. The Makkah Route initiative aims to provide high-quality services to pilgrims from participating countries by receiving them and facilitating their entry procedures in their home countries. This includes collecting biometric data and issuing Hajj visas electronically, completing passport control procedures at the departure airport after verifying compliance with health requirements, tagging and sorting luggage according to transportation and accommodation arrangements in the Kingdom. Pilgrims under the initiative are transferred directly to buses that transport pilgrims to their accommodations in Makkah and Madinah via dedicated routes. Partner organizations are responsible for delivering their luggage to these accommodations. It is worthy to note that the Ministry of Interior is implementing the initiative in cooperation with the Ministries of Foreign Affairs, Health, Hajj and Umrah, and Media, as well as the General Authority of Civil Aviation, the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority, the Saudi Data and Artificial Intelligence Authority (SDAIA), the General Authority for Endowments, the Guests of God Service Program, and the General Directorate of Passports.

items.title: Lower section of Kaaba’s Kiswa raised in preparation for Hajj 2026
items.title_zh: 为准备2026年朝觐而筹集的Kaaba's Kiswa的下部
items.summary: MAKKAH — The General Authority for the Care of the Affairs of the Grand Mosque and the Prophet's Mosque has completed the annual raising of the lower section of the Holy Kaaba’s Kiswa (cover) by three meters. This is part of a comprehensive preparations to receive pilgrims for the Hajj season of 2026. A specialized team of 34 skilled craftsmen was involved in completing the task of raising the lower section of Kiswa within two hours. In line with organized and precise protocols, the team raised the silk covering and secured a two-meter-wide white cotton cloth around all four sides of the Kaaba.**media[2694074]**This procedure is a standard maintenance practice aimed at preserving the integrity of the Kiswa and protecting it from potential damage or friction during the high-density Tawaf by the large number of pilgrims.**media[2694072]**The authority emphasized that the process adhered to the highest safety and professional standards, reflecting the meticulous care and attention dedicated to the sanctity of the Grand Mosque.

items.title: Quadrilateral Islamic ministerial meeting in Antalya focused on regional de-escalation
items.title_zh: 在安塔利亚举行的四方伊斯兰部长级会议侧重于区域降级
items.summary: ANTALYA — Foreign ministers of Saudi Arabia, Turkiye, Pakistan and Egypt met in the Turkish city of Antalya to discuss the latest regional developments in the region. Their talks focused on contributing to regional de-escalation and sparing the region and the world the serious security and economic repercussions of war. Support for Pakistan’s mediation efforts and its endeavors to reach a permanent ceasefire between Iran and the United States were figured mainly in their talks.Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan attended the quadrilateral ministerial meeting along with Turkish Minister of Foreign Affairs Hakan Fidan, Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Foreign Affairs Mohammad Ishaq Dar, and Egyptian Minister of Foreign Affairs, Emigration and Egyptian Expatriates Dr. Badr Abdelatty.

items.title: Saudi, US foreign ministers discuss Hormuz, Lebanon ceasefire
items.title_zh: 沙特、美国外长讨论黎巴嫩霍尔木兹停火
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Foreign Minister Prince Faisal bin Farhan held a phone call with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss regional developments on Friday.The call focused on efforts to ensure the continued opening of the Strait of Hormuz and to sustain the ceasefire in Lebanon.Both sides also emphasized the importance of dialogue and diplomatic solutions to enhance security and stability across the region.

items.title: Saudi Arabia amends anti-money laundering law, imposes travel ban on offenders
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯修订反洗钱法，对违法者实施旅行禁令
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia’s Cabinet has approved amendments to the anti-money laundering law, including new provisions imposing travel bans on convicted offenders and expanding asset confiscation measures.Under the updated Article 28, Saudi nationals sentenced to prison for money laundering will be banned from traveling abroad for a period equal to their prison term.Non-Saudi offenders will be deported after serving their sentence and barred from re-entering the Kingdom, except for Hajj or Umrah in accordance with regulations.The amendments also reinforce financial penalties. Article 33 stipulates that courts must order the confiscation of laundered funds, proceeds, and related assets upon conviction. If illicit funds are mixed with legitimate assets, an equivalent value will be seized.Courts may also confiscate other assets belonging to the offender that are disproportionate to their legitimate income if proven to be derived from criminal activity, unless lawful origin is established.The updated provisions allow courts to confiscate assets regardless of whether they are held by the offender or a third party, provided it is proven they are linked to the crime. However, assets will not be seized if the owner can demonstrate they were acquired in good faith and for fair value.Courts are also empowered to invalidate or suspend transactions or activities that could hinder authorities from recovering assets subject to confiscation.A new Article 49 bis assigns the Permanent Committee for Combating Money Laundering the responsibility of developing and updating risk-based national policies, assessing threats — including those linked to high-risk countries — and aligning with international standards. The Saudi Central Bank governor will issue the committee’s internal regulations.The amendments also include the removal of the term “non-profit organizations” from several articles of the law.

items.title: Commerce Ministry blocks online store over use of national symbols in ads
items.title_zh: 商务部禁止在线商店在广告中使用国家符号
items.summary: RIYADH — The Ministry of Commerce has blocked an online store after it was found using images of national symbols and state officials to promote its products, in violation of regulations.The ministry said the store exploited such images in commercial advertising, breaching rules that prohibit the use of official symbols and figures in business activities.It noted that a circular issued under a royal directive bans the use of the state emblem, as well as images and names of officials, in commercial transactions, publications, and promotional materials.The ministry stressed that such practices constitute a clear violation of regulations.It added that inspection campaigns on online stores are ongoing to detect similar violations and take legal action against offenders.
